ec2.launchtemplate.hibernationoptions.Cf: Specifies whether your instance is configured for hibernation. This parameter is valid only if the instance meets the [hibernation prerequisites](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/Hibernate.html

ec2.launchtemplate.hibernationoptions.Co.Description: If you set this parameter to `true`, the instance is enabled for hibernation.  Default: `false`
